headline: FCPT Announces a Single Property Asset Exchange with Darden Restaurants
summary: MILL VALLEY, Calif., May 29, 2026--Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT), a real estate investment trust primarily engaged in the ownership and acquisition of high-quality, net-leased restaurant and retail properties ("FCPT" or the "Company"), is pleased to announce a single property asset exchange with Darden Restaurants ("Darden").
